name: Mock Bank
description: Reference plugin that simulates a bank portal for development and testing. Demonstrates Playwright-based data extraction with MCP tool exposure.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

tools.name: fetch_transactions
tools.description: Fetch bank transactions for a date range. Returns normalized transaction objects.

tools.name: fetch_tax_documents
tools.description: Fetch tax documents (Form 106 / annual statements) for a given year. Returns normalized document objects.

year.description: Tax year to fetch documents for (e.g. 2025)
